parsedBody.response:
Based on the data fetched today, March 1, 2026, the top result in the Sports category by volume is a market regarding both teams scoring. While Kalshi's top market focuses on this general outcome, the high-volume matches on Polymarket are specific Champions League spread markets.

### Top Sports Market Comparison

| Attribute | Kalshi Top Result | Polymarket High Volume Match |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Title / Event** | yes Both Teams To Score | SK Slavia Praha vs. FC Barcelona |
| **Market Question** | Both Teams To Score | Spread: FC Barcelona (-1.5) |
| **Yes Price** | 0¢ | 1.00 (100%) |
| **Volume** | N/A (Top by Category) | $352,764.80 |
| **Ticker/Slug** | KXMVECROSSCATEGORY-S2026B9BA0E78301-E1C1ED944DA | ucl-slp-fcb1-2026-01-21-more-markets |

### Additional High-Volume Polymarket Sports Results

| Event Title | Market Question | Yes Price | Volume |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| FC Bayern München vs. RU Saint-Gilloise | Spread: FC Bayern München (-2.5) | 0.00 | $141,328.77 |
| Chelsea FC vs. Páfos FC | Spread: Chelsea FC (-2.5) | 0.00 | $92,020.89 |

*Note: Data reflects a snapshot from previous query results. Polymarket prices are shown as decimals (1.00 = 100%), while Kalshi prices are in cents.*

kalshiTopMarket.title: yes Both Teams To Score,yes Both Teams To Score,yes Both Teams To Score

polymarketMatches.title: SK Slavia Praha vs. FC Barcelona - More Markets
polymarketMatches.question: Spread: FC Barcelona (-1.5)
polymarketMatches.rules:
In the upcoming UEFA Champions League game, scheduled for January 21 at 3:00 PM ET:
  
  This market will resolve to "FC Barcelona" if FC Barcelona win the game by 2 or more goals.
  
  Otherwise, this market will resolve to "SK Slavia Praha".
  
  If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.
  
  This market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The event described in "SK Slavia Praha vs. FC Barcelona - More Markets" occurs
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "SK Slavia Praha vs. FC Barcelona - More Markets" does NOT occur

polymarketMatches.title: FC Bayern München vs. RU Saint-Gilloise - More Markets
polymarketMatches.question: Spread: FC Bayern München (-2.5)
polymarketMatches.rules:
In the upcoming UEFA Champions League game, scheduled for January 21 at 3:00 PM ET:
  
  This market will resolve to "FC Bayern München" if FC Bayern München win the game by 3 or more goals.
  
  Otherwise, this market will resolve to "RU Saint-Gilloise".
  
  If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.
  
  This market will resolve according to the official final score published on uefa.com. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.
polymarketMatches.yesOutcomeMeans: The event described in "FC Bayern München vs. RU Saint-Gilloise - More Markets" occurs
polymarketMatches.noOutcomeMeans: The event described in "FC Bayern München vs. RU Saint-Gilloise - More Markets" does NOT occur

data.analysisNote:
⚠️ CROSS-PLATFORM COMPARISON GUIDE:
1. Polymarket prices are decimals (0.25 = 25%), Kalshi prices are cents (25 = 25%)
2. READ 'yesOutcomeMeans' for each market - they may be INVERTED!
3. Example: If Polymarket YES means "Court rules AGAINST" and Kalshi YES means "Court rules IN FAVOR", then Polymarket NO ≈ Kalshi YES
4. Only compare prices AFTER confirming outcomes align!
